summary: Dow fell 280 pts (0.57%) for 5th straight losing day; S&P 500 -0.04% to 7,135.95; Nasdaq +0.04% to 24,673.24. Fed held rates steady amid historic 8-4 dissent. Oil prices rising on U.S. blockade of Iranian ports. Magnificent Seven earnings due tonight. Seagate +18% on AI demand earnings. Pershing Square IPO raised $5B at low end.
